title: Warranty Handoff Record
description: Schema for a warranty handoff record within a scope of work. Captures warranty type, duration, conditions, exclusions, and documentation required for warranty transfer at project closeout.

handoff_id.description: Unique identifier for this warranty handoff record.

title.description: Human-readable title for the warranty handoff.

scope_ref.description: Reference to the parent scope_of_work record.

conditions.description: Conditions that must be met for warranty validity.

exclusions.description: Items or conditions excluded from warranty coverage.

start_trigger.description: Event that triggers the warranty start date.

documentation_required.description: Documents required to activate or maintain the warranty.
